response.justification: The candidate meets the minimum bar of roughly 18 years of software experience and a technical bachelor's degree, with genuine breadth across web, embedded, and high-throughput systems plus founder experience via GISCollective. However, the role is a director-level principal position centered on AI strategy, and the resume shows a career trajectory of senior/staff IC product work with only recent, light AI-adjacent exposure (MCP tooling since 2025), no recognized AI expertise or AI-built products, no advanced AI degree, and no evidence of organization-level technical leadership or strategic advisory work.
strengths: 18+ years of hands-on software engineering across diverse stacks and domains
Founder/entrepreneurial experience building and sustaining an open-source geo-data platform
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP developer tooling
concerns: No demonstrated director/principal-level scope or engineering leadership at scale
AI experience is shallow and very recent relative to the role's demand for recognized AI expertise
No advanced degree or public track record in AI/ML products or platform strategy

key_factors.factor: Long, broad engineering experience with entrepreneurial background
